mapper.select: SELECT prd_no AS productNo, prd_category AS category, prd_name AS name, prd_price AS price, prd_image AS image, prd_memo AS memo, prd_brand AS brand FROM fc_java.prdinfo;
SELECT prd_no AS productNo, prd_category AS category, prd_name AS name, prd_price AS price, prd_image AS image, prd_memo AS memo, prd_brand AS brand FROM fc_java.prdinfo WHERE prd_no = #{productId};
